headline: The 10 best markets for homebuyers in 2026
summary: Zillow ranked the most buyer-friendly housing markets of 2026 among the 50 largest U.S. metros.

headline: Home sellers are relisting properties at fastest pace in a decade, but spring supply is still low
summary: Frustrated sellers who pulled homes off the market last fall are now re-listing them at a quick pace, thanks to lower mortgage rates, but supply is still low.

raw.headline: Home sellers are relisting properties at fastest pace in a decade, but spring supply is still low
